creator: Christopher.davidson@gmail.com
text:
This bug is still closed. I have re-created the bug, in a new jail. Adding the details for potential re-evaluation.

Create a test_jellyfin.conf
test_jellyfin {
	#STARTUP/LOGGING
	exec.start = "/bin/sh /etc/rc";
	exec.stop = "/bin/sh /etc/rc.shutdown";
	exec.consolelog = "/var/log/jail_console_${name}.log";

	#PERMISSIONS
	allow.raw_sockets;
	exec.clean;
	mount.devfs;
	allow.mlock;

	#ZFS
	allow.mount;
	allow.mount.zfs;
	enforce_statfs 1;


	# VNET / HOSTNAME
	host.hostname = "${name}.home";
	path = "/usr/local/jails/containers/${name}";

	# VNET / VIMAGE
	vnet;
	vnet.interface = "${epair}b";

	# NETWORKS / INTERFACES
	$id = "11";
	$ip = "192.168.0.${id}/24";
	$gateway = "192.168.0.1";
	$bridge = "bridge0";
	$epair = "epair${id}";

	exec.prestart += "ifconfig ${epair} create up";
  	exec.prestart += "ifconfig ${epair}a up descr jail:${name}";
  	exec.prestart += "ifconfig ${bridge} addm ${epair}a up";
  	exec.start    += "ifconfig ${epair}b ${ip} up";
  	exec.start    += "route add default ${gateway}";
  	exec.poststop += "ifconfig ${bridge} deletem ${epair}a";
  	exec.poststop += "ifconfig ${epair}a destroy";


	#MOUNTS
	#mount.fstab = "/usr/local/jails/containers/${name}/${name}.fstab";

}

Create the jail directory
mkdir -p /usr/local/jails/containers/test_jellyfin
tar -xf /usr/local/jails/media/14.2-RELEASE-base.txz -C /usr/local/jails/containers/test_jellyfin --unlink
cp /etc/resolv.conf /usr/local/jails/containers/test_jellyfin/etc
cp /etc/localtime /usr/local/jails/containers/test_jellyfin/etc

Login to the jail

Prepare the environment for the capture of ports.git
	pkg install git
	cd /usr
	git clone https://git.freebsd.org/ports.git 

Navigate to the jellyfin directory
cd /usr/ports/multimedia/jellyfin
make install clean

Navigate through the different package configurations
